LapPrediction.description: One projected lap with its own confidence band (api-contract §6).
LapPrediction.title: LapPrediction

LapPredictionResponse.description:
Multi-lap projection response (api-contract §6).

Replaces the legacy `PredictionEnvelope`-based single-value shape; the
handler still emits the old shape until Task 1C.2 rewires it.
LapPredictionResponse.title: LapPredictionResponse

SessionEventEntry.description:
One row from the historical session_events log.

Drives the highlight-reel / chronological event widget on the
session-detail page. `atS` is seconds since `startedAt`.
SessionEventEntry.title: SessionEventEntry

SettingsPatch.description: Partial — any subset of the top-level keys.
SettingsPatch.title: SettingsPatch

ShiftReportResponse.description:
Response shape for GET /api/predict/shift/report (FR-022, FR-051).

v2 additions (FR-051):
- ``assistInterventionPct``: session-lifetime assist-intervention fraction in
  [0, 1].  Sourced from the live ``ShiftPredictor``'s in-memory session
  counters when ``sessionId=live``; 0.0 for historical sessions because the
  assist counter is not persisted between process restarts.
- ``byGearPair[*].direction``: "up" for gear_to > gear_from, "down" otherwise.
ShiftReportResponse.title: ShiftReportResponse

ShiftResetRequest.description:
POST /api/predict/shift/reset body (FR-023).

Accepts EITHER explicit (carOrdinal, performanceIndex, numCylinders)
OR sessionId="live"/<id> to resolve the fingerprint from the live frame.
ShiftResetRequest.title: ShiftResetRequest

TireFailurePredictionResponse.description:
Per-corner tire-failure projection.

`perCorner` maps each wheel (fl, fr, rl, rr) to its current wear,
a projected lap when wear hits 1.0 (None for free-roam / cold
session), and the model's confidence. `limitingCorner` is the
wheel with the earliest projected failure (or the highest wear if
no laps yet).
TireFailurePredictionResponse.title: TireFailurePredictionResponse

WorldMapCalibration.description:
Two reference points mapping FH6 world (X, Z) → tile-pyramid pixel (X, Y).

Stored as lists for JSON round-trip stability. The widget derives a per-axis
linear transform from these four pairs; see api-contract §10 + the world_map
widget for the math.
WorldMapCalibration.title: WorldMapCalibration

WorldMapSettings.description:
Configuration for the `world_map` widget.

`calibration` is null until the user runs the in-widget calibration tool
(capture point A's world coords from telemetry, click pixel A on the map,
repeat for B). Defaults to the fh6-tel Japan preset so the widget renders
correctly against the bundled tile pyramid before users run their own
calibration on the real FH6 map.
WorldMapSettings.title: WorldMapSettings

patch.description:
Crowdsourcing path for car names.

The bundled ordinal → name table is community-maintained and will
always lag behind Playground's car-pack drops. When a user sees a
car named `Car #{ordinal}` they can submit the correct name; we
stamp every Car row sharing that ordinal so all tunes of the same
car get fixed at once. The DB row wins over the static lookup for
subsequent reads (PgCarRepository.upsert no longer overwrites
display_name on update).

post.description: T112: stream the AskCoach output as chunked transfer-encoded.

T115/T116: build a `Replay(kind=telemetry_clip)` from the insight's
cited window.

Response Generate For Session Api Coach Insights  Session Id  Generate Post

delete.description:
`DELETE /api/data/all` (API spec §13). Gated by header X-Confirm.

Wipes every car (and via FK cascade every session, frame, and
mistake) so the cars dropdown is truly empty afterwards.

get.description:
Project the next ``n`` lap times (api-contract §6).

- Seeds the LapResidualModel from ``Session.best_lap_s`` (replicated up
  to ``SEED_WINDOW_LEN`` times by ``lap_count``) and rolls the window
  forward across each projection so later laps condition on earlier ones.
- Confidence is monotone non-increasing across ``k``: the raw model
  confidence is capped at the first projection's value (the model's raw
  confidence can rise as the seed window fills, so without a cap the
  net confidence is not strictly monotone), then multiplied by
  ``CONFIDENCE_DECAY_PER_LAP ** k``.
- ``predictedAt`` reads ``raceTimeS`` from the most recent hot-cache
  frame for this (session, car). When no frame has arrived yet we fall
  back to ``0.0`` — callers should treat 0.0 as "no live frame yet".
- ``limiter`` is ``None`` for now; tire-wear gating is a follow-up
  (backend work item 1).
FR-021: current shift recommendation for the session's fingerprint.
FR-022 / FR-051: per-session shift report aggregated from shift_events_clean.

post.description: FR-023: drop in-memory + on-disk state for a fingerprint.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api Sessions Get

get.description:
Return the most recent in-flight session (ended_at IS NULL).

The live UI polls this to find the session id to wire predictions,
coach feed, and session detail against. 404 when nothing is open.

API spec §8 `GET /api/track/current`. Always returns
`inferred=true` in MVP (FR-019).

T078: aggregated mistake heatmap. MVP returns the documented
shape with zero buckets until detectors persist mistakes (lands with
coach detectors in US3 / event detectors in US1).

T077: AI-computed optimal line vs. driver's line.

MVP returns the recorded line on both sides (your-line == optimal-line)
and an empty incidents list. Full optimal-line synthesis lands when
the lap-residual + corner-detection models stabilise (US5/US6).
